Llama-3.1-8B.fallback_note: primary meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B is gated (HTTP 403); used open mirror unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B with identical tokenizer

supersedes.note: p3 substrate switched 2026-04-22 to Ministral-3-14B-Base-2512 (Apache-2.0, dense 14B, 256k ctx). Tekken 131k vocab retained; text-token ids identical to Nemo, so encoding length identical for this 150-sentence sample (std differs by +0.14 due to BOS-handling path in the fast encoder).

supersedes.prior_fallback_note: primary google/gemma-3-12b-pt is gated (HTTP 403); used open mirror unsloth/gemma-3-12b-pt with identical tokenizer
supersedes.note: p4 substrate upgraded 2026-04-22 to Gemma-4-31B (Apache-2.0, released 2026-04-02, ungated canonical). Gemma-4 inherits identical SentencePiece text vocab; 150-prompt sample yields IDENTICAL mean/total (34.58 / 5187); std differs by +0.13 tokens vs prior mirror (within rounding/BOS-path noise). Vocab size normalizes from mirror's 262145 -> canonical 262144. Multimodal sentinels restructured (Gemma-3 <start_of_image>/<end_of_image>/<image_soft_token>/<start_of_turn>/<end_of_turn> removed; Gemma-4 <|image>, <|audio>, <|video|>, <|tool>*, <|think|>, <|channel>, <|turn> added), but text-token IDs remain byte-identical over r13 corpus.

method_note: Tokenizers loaded via tokenizers.Tokenizer.from_pretrained (fast-tokenizer path). transformers library install was sandbox-blocked, so SentencePiece-only models that lack tokenizer.json would fail.
